test.query: SELECT normalizeUTF8NFC(SearchPhrase) FROM (SELECT SearchPhrase FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 15000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT normalizeUTF8NFD(SearchPhrase) FROM hits_10m_single FORMAT Null
SELECT normalizeUTF8NFKC(SearchPhrase) FROM (SELECT SearchPhrase FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 15000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT normalizeUTF8NFKD(SearchPhrase) FROM hits_10m_single FORMAT Null
